summary.what: Friendly onboarding: don't treat pre-timbers history as pending
summary.why: Display callers check latest==nil instead of storage returning empty, because log/batch/MCP need commits for the first entry
summary.how: pending.go and doctor_checks.go intercept no-entries state at display layer; added JSON status field, doctor test, init catchup tip

notes: Plan originally changed GetPendingCommits to return empty on no-entries, but that broke timbers log, batch log, and MCP log — they all need commits to create the first entry. Moved the fix to the display layer where pending/doctor check latest==nil. Storage behavior unchanged, keeping all callers working.
